'''鈭歴h-j-zh''' ('''shajazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camerate|camerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camerate|camerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-j-zh
|-
! Lemma
| shajazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajazhithi|shajazhithi]] || [[word:shajazhiji|shajazhiji]] || [[word:shajazhishi|shajazhishi]] || [[word:shajazhi|shajazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajazhuthuth|shajazhuthuth]] || [[word:shajazhujuj|shajazhujuj]] || [[word:shajazhushush|shajazhushush]] || [[word:shajazh|shajazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajazhuthu|shajazhuthu]] || [[word:shajazhuju|shajazhuju]] || [[word:shajazhushu|shajazhushu]] || [[word:shajazhu|shajazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajazhufuth|shajazhufuth]] || [[word:shajazhufuj|shajazhufuj]] || [[word:shajazhufush|shajazhufush]] || [[word:shajazhuf|shajazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajazhethe|shajazhethe]] || [[word:shajazheje|shajazheje]] || [[word:shajazheshe|shajazheshe]] || [[word:shajazhe|shajazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajazhothoth|shajazhothoth]] || [[word:shajazhojoj|shajazhojoj]] || [[word:shajazhoshosh|shajazhoshosh]] || [[word:shajazh|shajazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajazhotho|shajazhotho]] || [[word:shajazhojo|shajazhojo]] || [[word:shajazhosho|shajazhosho]] || [[word:shajazho|shajazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajazhofoth|shajazhofoth]] || [[word:shajazhofoj|shajazhofoj]] || [[word:shajazhofosh|shajazhofosh]] || [[word:shajazhof|shajazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajazh忙th忙|shajazh忙th忙]] || [[word:shajazh忙j忙|shajazh忙j忙]] || [[word:shajazh忙sh忙|shajazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:shajazh忙|shajazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajazhathath|shajazhathath]] || [[word:shajazhajaj|shajazhajaj]] || [[word:shajazhashash|shajazhashash]] || [[word:shajazh|shajazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajazhatha|shajazhatha]] || [[word:shajazhaja|shajazhaja]] || [[word:shajazhasha|shajazhasha]] || [[word:shajazha|shajazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajazhafath|shajazhafath]] || [[word:shajazhafaj|shajazhafaj]] || [[word:shajazhafash|shajazhafash]] || [[word:shajazhaf|shajazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shajazhasha|shajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazhasha|goshajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazhasha|gokishajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazhn眉sha|shajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhnkn眉sha|goshajazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhn眉sha|gokishajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazhsh毛sha|shajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazhnksh毛sha|goshajazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazhsh毛sha|gokishajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhrosha|shajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhnkrosha|goshajazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhrosha|gokishajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhmusha|shajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhnkmusha|goshajazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhmusha|gokishajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazhsherasha|shajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazhnksherasha|goshajazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazhsherasha|gokishajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazhngasha|shajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazhnkngasha|goshajazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazhngasha|gokishajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazhyasha|shajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazhnkyasha|goshajazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazhyasha|gokishajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazhyamasha|shajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazhnkyamasha|goshajazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazhyamasha|gokishajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhn眉sh毛sha|shajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goshajazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhn眉sh毛sha|gokishajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhn眉rosha|shajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhnkn眉rosha|goshajazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhn眉rosha|gokishajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhn眉musha|shajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhnkn眉musha|goshajazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhn眉musha|gokishajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhsh毛n眉sha|shajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhnksh毛n眉sha|goshajazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhsh毛n眉sha|gokishajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhsh毛rosha|shajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhnksh毛rosha|goshajazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhsh毛rosha|gokishajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhsh毛musha|shajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhnksh毛musha|goshajazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhsh毛musha|gokishajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhron眉sha|shajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhnkron眉sha|goshajazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhron眉sha|gokishajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhrosh毛sha|shajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhnkrosh毛sha|goshajazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhrosh毛sha|gokishajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazhromusha|shajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazhnkromusha|goshajazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazhromusha|gokishajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazhmun眉sha|shajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazhnkmun眉sha|goshajazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazhmun眉sha|gokishajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazhmush毛sha|shajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazhnkmush毛sha|goshajazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazhmush毛sha|gokishajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazhmurosha|shajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazhnkmurosha|goshajazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazhmurosha|gokishajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shajazh|shajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙j忙zh|sh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshajazh|hoshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙j忙zh|hosh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshajazh|hohoshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙j忙zh|hohosh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shajazh|n眉shajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙j忙zh|n眉sh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shajazh|n眉n眉shajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙j忙zh|n眉n眉sh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shajazh|n茂shajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙j忙zh|n茂sh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shajazh|n茂n茂shajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙j忙zh|n茂n茂sh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushajazh|lushajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙j忙zh|lush忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushajazh|lulushajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙j忙zh|lulush忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishajazh|lishajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙j忙zh|lish忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishajazh|lilishajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙j忙zh|lilish忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshajazh|koshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙j忙zh|kosh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshajazh|kokoshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙j忙zh|kokosh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshajazh|keshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙j忙zh|kesh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshajazh|kekeshajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙j忙zh|kekesh忙j忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
